title: Goroutine leak when hashJoin triggered spill and sql failed.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users(id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), age INT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE orders(order_id INT PRIMARY KEY, user_id INT, amount DECIMAL(10, 2), FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id));
key_bug_features: hashJoin's children can't call Close() function
